# cutitaru

> Web design, Shopify stores, and Google/Facebook ads for businesses in Moldova and internationally. Remote — Chișinău and worldwide. Languages: Romanian, English, Russian.

## Services (RO)
- [Design web Moldova](https://cutitaru.com/design-web-moldova.html): Site-uri de prezentare, landing pages, SEO inclus.
- [Shopify Moldova](https://cutitaru.com/magazin-online-shopify-moldova.html): Magazine online complete.
- [Reclame Google/Facebook](https://cutitaru.com/reclame-google-facebook-moldova.html): Campanii plătite cu tracking.

## Services (EN)
- [Web design Moldova](https://cutitaru.com/en/web-design-moldova.html): Presentation websites, landing pages, SEO included.
- [Shopify store Moldova](https://cutitaru.com/en/shopify-store-moldova.html): Full online stores.
- [Google & Facebook ads](https://cutitaru.com/en/google-facebook-ads-moldova.html): Paid campaigns with tracking.

## Services (RU)
- [Веб-дизайн Молдова](https://cutitaru.com/ru/veb-dizayn-moldova.html): Сайты-визитки, landing page, SEO.
- [Shopify Молдова](https://cutitaru.com/ru/internet-magazin-shopify-moldova.html): Интернет-магазины.
- [Реклама Google/Facebook](https://cutitaru.com/ru/reklama-google-facebook-moldova.html): Платные кампании с отслеживанием.

## Pages
- [Acasă RO](https://cutitaru.com/): Servicii, FAQ, contact.
- [Home EN](https://cutitaru.com/en/): English version.
- [Главная RU](https://cutitaru.com/ru/): Русская версия.
